news.headline: Senior Japanese minister expresses regret over military officer’s arrest at Chinese embassy
news.summary:
A senior Japanese official and the country’s military have expressed regret after a serving officer was arrested on suspicion of trespassing at the Chinese embassy in Tokyo.
Tokyo police have identified the 23-year-old suspect as Kodai Murata, a second lieutenant with the Ground Self-Defence Force (

news.headline: Iran’s new security boss Mohammad Zolghadr: Why his appointment matters
news.summary: Zolghadr, an ex-IRGC commander, will manage Iran's security amid external US-Israeli pressures and internal unrest.

news.headline: 'The humanitarian crisis here is worsening by the minute': Israel continues to bomb Lebanon
news.summary: More than a million people have been driven from their homes in Lebanon as Israel continues its bombardment of the country and seizes land south of the Litani River. FRANCE 24 correspondent Renée Davis reports from Beirut on the rising resentment towards Israel's ongoing air strikes.

news.headline: Democrats projected to win back Florida district home to Trump's Mar-a-Lago
news.summary: The US Democratic Party appears to have won back a Florida state legislative from the Republicans – and one that's home to US President Donald Trump's lavish Mar-a-Lago estate.

news.headline: Railways minister says Tezgam Express derailment likely due to ‘mechanical and human error’
news.summary:
<p>LAHORE: Federal Minister for Railways Hanif Abbasi said on Wednesday that “human error and some mechanical issues” were most probably the reasons behind the derailment of the Karachi-bound Tezgam express train the day before.</p>
